narrative:
Precinct Monclova 8 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,055 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.5 percentage points.
